body:
Budget upgrade + one more pass: SLS(79) -> SLS(81)/9.95.

WARRANT#76: MaxCalibrationMinutes default raised 90 -> 240, grounded in real evidence (the 2026-07-17 live run actually logged budget-tight warnings during Phase 3B). Every phase already fails open on timeout, so this only ever buys more time before that same safe fallback -- no new failure mode. Left the two independent 90-second safety-valve budgets (INDINTEL/PASS13 passes) untouched -- different purpose, hang-prevention ceilings that already complete in under 3 seconds, not a work budget.

WARRANT#77 (forge-indicate r7): relationship-OOS decisive test -- buckets ghost trades by regime coherence into low/mid/high bands, logs realized WR per band. Same pattern as Keys-3's R-band test.

Both compiled 0 errors, diff-verified purely additive.

FLOOR REACHED AGAIN, honestly: with WARRANT#77, forge-indicate's r7 gate set is essentially complete at the measurement level across all four lanes now. What's left -- Keys-3's R-as-universal-conditioner (correctly gated on its own decisive experiment's result), forge-edge-2's live-cell wiring (gated behind S2+S5 passing on a real run), and a genuine CSCV rebuild -- all now structurally need either a completed live/ghost run or a substantially bigger dedicated build. Not manufacturing more marginal slices to keep the warrant count climbing.

Attaching final SLS(81) mq4+ex4 and the updated forge_ledger.json (61 passes).
